summary: Iter9 PASSED end-to-end. Bug fix confirmed: on /accounting/transactions, all 5 action icons (txn-approve-btn, txn-recategorize-btn, txn-split-btn, txn-link-btn, delete-btn) are ALWAYS visible per row without hover — verified 97 rows, 5/5 first rows show all 5 icons. New features verified: (a) /reports/ap-aging endpoint returns {buckets, lines, total, as_of}; bucket sum equals total on live Skyward data (total=$2,000, current bucket). (b) GL entries now carry txn_id (for Txn/Split) and je_id (for JE); UI badges are clickable — Txn -> /accounting/transactions?highlight=<id>, Split -> /accounting/transactions?highlight=<id>&open=split, JE -> /accounting/journal-entries?highlight=<je_id>. All three navigations produced correct URLs. (c) Invoice PATCH works: line_items recalc subtotal/tax/total/balance_due; edit modal opens with title 'Edit Invoice INV-1001', line items pre-populated, Save changes button present. (d) Bill PATCH works identically; Bills page renders A/P Aging widget with 5 buckets (Current/1–30/31–60/61–90/90+) with colored tiles + stacked ratio bar; edit modal opens correctly. Regression: Trial Balance balanced (total_debit==total_credit), Balance Sheet imbalance=0.0, A/R aging still works, all 7 report endpoints (IS/CF/Sales Tax/1099/TB/BS/GL), dashboard metrics, transactions, accounts, JE, contacts, plaid link-token — all 200. 17/17 pytest tests pass.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:914-925 (update_invoice) and 962-973 (update_bill) accept a raw dict payload — no Pydantic model. Works, but a typed InvoicePatch/BillPatch model would give 422s with field errors and better OpenAPI. Current behavior silently persists arbitrary keys (e.g. 'qty'/'unit_price' were stored as-is when tests sent them). Consider whitelisting keys before $set to avoid schema drift.

Invoices.jsx:65 renders the A/R aging widget only when aging.total > 0. If a client zeroes out all invoices, the widget silently disappears — acceptable UX for empty state but consider a stub 'No outstanding A/R' card instead so users know the report is wired.
Transactions action icons visibility fix (always-visible, colored) verified — 5 icons on 97 rows all render without hover. Solid.
test_credentials: client@axiom.ai/client123 — used throughout. pro/admin not exercised this iter.
seed_data_creation: Test transiently PATCHed INV-1001 and one bill (BILL-501) with TEST_iter9 line_items to verify recalc; both restored in try/finally with realistic seed-like values (INV-1001 -> $5400 total, BILL-501 -> $1250 total). After my earlier initial test run (before try/finally added) I had to manually restore INV-1001 and BILL-501 to correct totals via direct PATCH — final DB state is clean and matches seed intent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: GL 'sections' key (not 'accounts') carries the account groups; each entry has txn_id (Txn/Split) or je_id (JE). PATCH /invoices and /bills use raw dict payload — send {line_items:[{amount:N,...}], tax:N} and the backend recalculates subtotal/tax/total/balance_due via _sum_lines which reads only .amount from each line. Always wrap invoice/bill PATCH tests in try/finally to restore data since only 1 invoice + 2 bills are seeded on Skyward Sparks. Plaid link-token is POST /companies/{cid}/onboarding/plaid/link-token (not GET). Login response uses 'token' key.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. The reported icon-visibility bug is fully fixed.
